_comment: OPT-IN automated login. Copy to login-config.json (gitignored) and edit. This file holds ROUTING ONLY — never a password. Store the password in the OS keyring: `keyring set pinchtab-webgraph you@example.com`. Then crawl with: interaction_crawl --start <url> --login-config login-config.json. Fields marked optional are auto-detected from standard HTML (input type / autocomplete / DOM order); set them explicitly only if detection picks the wrong element.
